result:
1	---
     2	name: qjudge-exam-grading-sop
     3	description: Open-ended 題目 AI 批改 SOP(YAML)。
     4	---
     5	
     6	```yaml
     7	sop:
     8	  purpose: "Open-ended AI 批改:訂 rubric + seed grade.csv → 一題一題評 → 寫回。"
     9	
    10	  artifacts:
    11	    rubric.md:
    12	      writer: artifact_write
    13	      content_type: text/markdown
    14	
    15	    grade.csv:
    16	      seeder:   artifact_csv_from_json   # Stage 2 建檔
    17	      searcher: artifact_csv_search       # Stage 3/5 狀態檢查(不帶 rows)
    18	      loader:   artifact_csv_to_json      # Stage 3/5 取批次 payload
    19	      patcher:  artifact_csv_patch        # Stage 3/5 寫回部分變動
    20	      columns: [index, exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback, score, reason, synced]
    21	      key_column: exam_answer_id
    22	
    23	  note: >
    24	    artifact 工具的 step 參數為 optional，正常流程省略即可；
    25	    工具會自動依 filename 定位唯一 artifact。僅在同 session 出現同名檔案時才需帶 step 消歧義。
    26	
    27	  stages:
    28	    - id: 1_target
    29	      out: context [contest_id, grading_question_id]
    30	      on_missing: 逐項問 user。
    31	
    32	    - id: 2_seed
    33	      steps:
    34	        - |
    35	          # 1. 產 rubric.md
    36	          artifact_write(
    37	            filename="rubric.md",
    38	            content=<markdown 評分標準>,
    39	            content_type="text/markdown",
    40	          )
    41	        - |
    42	          # 2. 抓答案
    43	          response = qjudge_grading(
    44	            action="list_answers",
    45	            contest_id=<X>, question_id=<Y>,
    46	            projection="grading",
    47	          )
    48	          # response 形狀: {"count": N, "items": [{exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback}, ...]}
    49	        - |
    50	          # 3. seed grade.csv（records 帶 index + 5 欄，defaults 補 score/reason/synced = 9 欄）
    51	          artifact_csv_from_json(
    52	            filename="grade.csv",
    53	            records=response["items"],
    54	            defaults={"score": "", "reason": "", "synced": ""},
    55	          )
    56	        - |
    57	          # 4. 宣告批次計畫（每 20 筆一個 todo）
    58	          write_todos(todos=[
    59	            {"content": "批改 index 1-20 依 rubric.md",  "status": "pending"},
    60	            {"content": "批改 index 21-40 依 rubric.md", "status": "pending"},
    61	            ...
    62	          ])
    63	      out: [rubric.md, grade.csv (score/reason/synced 都空), todo list]
    64	
    65	    - id: 3_grade_batch_of_20
    66	      rules:
    67	        - 一題一題依 rubric.md 決定 score 與 reason，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
    68	        - 禁止 artifact_read + offset/limit 手動找未評列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search / artifact_csv_to_json。
    69	        - reason 政策（省 output token）：
    70	            - 預設：滿分（rubric 最高分） → reason 留空；非滿分 → 必填 reason。
    71	            - 例外：滿分但有值得給的改進建議 → 可填。
    72	            - 覆寫：若 user 在 Stage 1 明說「每題都要寫 reason / 都要評語」 → 一律填。
    73	      loop:
    74	        - |
    75	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒評（便宜、不拉 rows）
    76	          status = artifact_csv_search(
    77	            filename="grade.csv",
    78	            where={"score": ""},
    79	          )
    80	          # status = {"matched": M, "total_rows": N}
    81	          # matched == 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
    82	        - |
    83	          # 2. 取本批 20 筆 + 必要兩欄（其他欄/列不載入，省 token）
    84	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
    85	            filename="grade.csv",
    86	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "answer_text"],
    87	            where={"score": ""},
    88	            limit=20,
    89	          )
    90	          # batch["records"] = [{exam_answer_id, answer_text}, ...]
    91	        - |
    92	          # 3. 對每一筆獨立思考後決定 score 與 reason（依 reason 政策）
    93	        - |
    94	          # 4. 寫回本批變動
    95	          artifact_csv_patch(
    96	            filename="grade.csv",
    97	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
    98	            updates=[
    99	              {"exam_answer_id": ..., "score": "...", "reason": "..."},
   100	              ... (本批 20 筆)
   101	            ],
   102	          )
   103	        - |
   104	          # 5. 更新 todo: 本批 completed，下一批 pending → in_progress
   105	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   106	        - status.matched > 0 → 下一輪；== 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
   107	
   108	    - id: 4_writeback_confirm
   109	      halt: true
   110	      precondition: |
   111	        artifact_csv_search(filename="grade.csv", where={"score": ""}) 回 matched == 0
   112	        （仍有空值 → 回 3_grade_batch_of_20 補完再進這裡）
   113	      branches:
   114	        contains_writeback_keyword: goto 5_writeback
   115	        other:                      ask_again (要「寫回」)
   116	      first_entry_message: |
   117	        全部 <N> 筆已評完（右側 panel 看 grade.csv）。
   118	        - 確認寫回 → 回「確認寫回」
   119	        - 取消 → 回「取消」
   120	
   121	    - id: 5_writeback
   122	      rules:
   123	        - 禁止手動解析 CSV 或寫 Python。search 看狀態 → to_json 組 payload → batch_grade → patch 標 synced。
   124	        - 每批最多 20 筆（跟 Stage 3 批次對齊）。
   125	        - 批次計畫前/每批完成後必 write_todos（跟 Stage 3 同規則）。
   126	      loop:
   127	        - |
   128	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒 sync
   129	          status = artifact_csv_search(
   130	            filename="grade.csv",
   131	            where={"synced": ""},
   132	          )
   133	          # matched == 0 → 跳出 loop 進 report
   134	        - |
   135	          # 2. 取這批 MCP payload（三欄）
   136	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
   137	            filename="grade.csv",
   138	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "score", "reason"],
   139	            where={"synced": ""},
   140	            limit=20,
   141	          )
   142	        - |
   143	          # 3. 整批寫回
   144	          qjudge_grading(action="batch_grade", grades=batch["records"])
   145	        - |
   146	          # 4. 成功的列標 synced="yes"；失敗的留空，等下輪重試或進 report
   147	          artifact_csv_patch(
   148	            filename="grade.csv",
   149	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
   150	            updates=[{"exam_answer_id": ..., "synced": "yes"}, ...],  # 只放成功的
   151	          )
   152	        - |
   153	          # 5. 更新 todo
   154	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   155	      report: 寫回 X 筆成功、Y 筆失敗（失敗列 exam_answer_id + 錯誤）。
   156	      idempotency: 同一 exam_answer_id 重複視為 no-op；synced=="yes" 的 row 下輪會自動被 where filter 跳過。
   157	
   158	  stage_resolution:
   159	    primary: artifact_list + artifact_csv_search
   160	    secondary: last_assistant_message
   161	    fallback: ask_user
   162	    map:
   163	      - {artifacts: [],                                    candidates: [1_target, 2_seed]}
   164	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty>0: stage: 3_grade_batch_of_20}
   165	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty=0: candidates: [4_writeback_confirm, 5_writeback]}
   166	
   167	  hard_rules:
   168	    - MCP 解析 / CSV 組裝必須在同一 turn 內自己做，禁 delegate task/subagent。
   169	    - 評分時一題一題思考並填 score，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
   170	    - 任何批次操作「前」都要 write_todos 宣告批次計畫；「每批完成後」立刻 write_todos 把該批標 completed；todo 未更新 = 不可進下一批。
   171	    - 禁止用 artifact_read + offset/limit 找未評/未 sync 列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search（狀態）或 artifact_csv_to_json（取 rows）。
   172	    - 寫回前 user 訊息必須含「寫回」兩字。
   173	```

檢查 grade.csv 未評分列並分批讀取答案
逐筆評分並批次更新 grade.csv
確認 grade.csv 無空白 score

input_data.content:
# 本題評分準則

- 題目：What is busy waiting (spinlock)?
- 滿分：2
- 參考答案重點：
  - busy waiting / spinlock 是「持續迴圈檢查條件是否成立」
  - 程式不會阻塞等待，而是反覆輪詢（polling / spinning）
  - 常見用途：等待可進入 critical section，或輪詢裝置/資料是否就緒

## 配分

- **2 分**：
  - 明確說出 busy waiting / spinlock 的核心概念：持續旋轉、反覆檢查條件、等待資源/旗標/狀態變成可用；
  - 且表達沒有真正睡眠或阻塞等待。
- **1 分**：
  - 只答到部分核心概念，例如「一直檢查」、「輪詢等待」、「忙碌迴圈等待」之一；
  - 但描述不完整，或沒有說清楚 spinlock / busy waiting 的本質。
- **0 分**：
  - 與題意無關、明顯錯誤，或只是在描述一般等待但沒有 busy waiting 的概念。

## 批改原則

- 以概念正確性為主，不要求字面完全一致。
- 若答案有明確指出「一直檢查條件直到成立」即可給到 1 分以上。
- 若答案提到「占用 CPU」、「不睡眠」、「不阻塞」等，也視為加強 busy waiting 的理解。
- 若答案只寫「等鎖 / 等資源」但沒有反覆檢查的意思，通常只能給 0 或 1 分。

result: Command(update={'todos': [{'content': '讀取題目資料與建立 rubric.md', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '檢查 grade.csv 未評分列並分批讀取答案', 'status': 'in_progress'}, {'content': '逐筆評分並批次更新 grade.csv', 'status': 'pending'}, {'content': '確認 grade.csv 無空白 score', 'status': 'pending'}], 'messages': [ToolMessage(content="Updated todo list to [{'content': '讀取題目資料與建立 rubric.md', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '檢查 grade.csv 未評分列並分批讀取答案', 'status': 'in_progress'}, {'content': '逐筆評分並批次更新 grade.csv', 'status': 'pending'}, {'content': '確認 grade.csv 無空白 score', 'status': 'pending'}]", tool_call_id='call_S3o49F9nsMRPjgdwPMxq3Oue')]})

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 123, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "1750", "answer_text": "不斷的佔有cpu資源去看條件是否符合"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1778", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is a loop to check whether a resource (ex. mutex, semaphore) could be accessed or not. If it can't, continue the loop and waiting. If it can, access the resource and leave the loop."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1757", "answer_text": "busy waiting, also known as spinlock, is when 高優先度的process在檢查狀態以進入critical session,但因資源被低優先度process佔用而進入不斷檢查的loop,會造成priority inversion"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1967", "answer_text": "process一直嘗試去enter critical section, 但一直無法 access，陷入不斷嘗試的loop中"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2299", "answer_text": "運用一個while迴圈並設計要確立的條件後，要busy waiting的process會根據條件一直做while loop的內容，只有當其可以跳出while loop的時候才可以不用waiting，之所以叫busy waiting是因為該process會搶到CPU的使用權後，卻一直執行無意義的迴圈，會浪費CPU的時間"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1991", "answer_text": "一個process在等待特地條件發生時，卡在迴圈裡面直到條件發生才繼續往下做，cpu就會在迴圈裡面一直跑。
會長得像
while(condiction == TRUE); // busy waiting
..."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1994", "answer_text": "process 嘗試要存取資料(通常是進入 critical section)時，因為有其他 process 正在存取而被阻擋在外，此時欲存取資料的 process 透過 for loop 的形式，不斷檢查此資料是否變為可用，此 process 在等待時將不做任何事情，而是不斷詢問是否能存取資料，因此叫做 busy waiting。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2217", "answer_text": "一個 process 為了等鎖釋放或某條件成立而在回圈內空轉，佔著 CPU 資源的情況。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1940", "answer_text": "一個high priority thread(process)在等被lower priority thread(process)被占用的資源的時候(lock or something)，因為CPU會把資源給高優先權的，會讓高優先權的一直空轉，導致低優先權的得不到CPU資源一直卡著那個lock。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2210", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is a technique problem that happened when a thread is looping, continue to check a condition exists can allow it to contiue or not. happened when it want to enter a critical section or to poll a device to get the data."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1726", "answer_text": "A process been always watching, continuously waiting for other process to release lock for  resource."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1925", "answer_text": "When a process want a lock or resource hold by other procrss, it keeps waiting for a lock or resource and doesn't do other things."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1966", "answer_text": "when a thread access the resource, the resource has been locked by other thread. The accessing thread would loop continuously to check the mutex is unlock or not."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1863", "answer_text": "Usually used for process synchronization, the idea is to stall CPU until the awaited resource is available. This can be useful if resource will be available soon and context switching time is larger then busy waiting time"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1852", "answer_text": "one keeps(e.g. loop) holding the lock, and the other one is waiting the lock to be released. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "1850", "answer_text": "when a thread/process is waiting for lock, if it keep use cpu without sleep, it calls busy waiting. like using a while loop keep check if the lock is freed"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1823", "answer_text": "Spinlock is when a process is executing a program and encounters a resource (lock/semaphore) that is currently occupied and that it therefore cannot access. As it's unable to proceed in its execution, the process has to wait for the resource to be available, and is going to loop and continuously check if the resource is available until it is and it can proceed. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "1931", "answer_text": "A busy waiting occurs when a thread or a process is blocked in a loop by a condition while it is not satisfied. Most of the time, it occurs when a thread or process wait for a mutex or a semaphore."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2170", "answer_text": "形容當一個 process 因為其他 process 正在 critical section 而因此等待進入時，會透過一個 loop 空轉卡在進入 section 前，雖然沒有進行任何實際運算或是存取，但仍然使用系統資源進行空轉"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1798", "answer_text": "busy waiting is to use a loop to keep waiting until it get lock."}]}

updates.reason: 有提到持續檢查條件並占用 CPU。
明確描述反覆迴圈檢查資源是否可用。
有說明不斷檢查狀態進入 critical section。
指出無法存取時持續嘗試並陷入迴圈。
完整說出 while 迴圈反覆檢查且浪費 CPU。
明確描述條件未滿足時在迴圈中持續等待。
有說出不斷檢查資源是否可用的輪詢概念。
寫到為了等鎖釋放而在回圈內空轉。
有提到等待資源時空轉、占用 CPU。
有描述持續 loop 檢查條件與輪詢裝置。
有表達持續等待鎖釋放，但未清楚說明反覆輪詢/空轉。
只描述等待資源，缺少持續檢查與空轉的核心。
明確寫出持續迴圈檢查 mutex 是否解鎖。
指出等待資源時暫停 CPU，符合 busy waiting 的用途。
只是在描述有人持有鎖、另一人等待，未提 busy waiting。
有說明不睡眠、用 while 迴圈持續檢查鎖是否釋放。
完整說出持續迴圈檢查資源是否可用。
明確描述條件未滿足時在迴圈中等待。
有說明在 critical section 前空轉、持續使用資源。
有寫到用迴圈持續等待直到取得鎖。

result: Command(update={'todos': [{'content': '讀取題目資料與建立 rubric.md', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '檢查 grade.csv 未評分列並分批讀取答案', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '逐筆評分並批次更新 grade.csv', 'status': 'in_progress'}, {'content': '確認 grade.csv 無空白 score', 'status': 'pending'}], 'messages': [ToolMessage(content="Updated todo list to [{'content': '讀取題目資料與建立 rubric.md', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '檢查 grade.csv 未評分列並分批讀取答案', 'status': 'completed'}, {'content': '逐筆評分並批次更新 grade.csv', 'status': 'in_progress'}, {'content': '確認 grade.csv 無空白 score', 'status': 'pending'}]", tool_call_id='call_jQKcBS3n95MhBxvJVpMlY5Ex')]})

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 103, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "1949", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is a process continuous loops(waste CPU time) to check if a condition is met or lock is released, rather than going to sleep. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "2088", "answer_text": "busy waiting又稱spinlock，是在multi-task的環境中，task需要等待其他task的資源(如lock或semaphore)，而一直定時去確認資源可不可用，此時會耗用CPU資源在等待上。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2323", "answer_text": "spinlock happens when a process A with higher priority wants to get the lock and go to critical section to execute, however, there is a process B of lower priority is having the lock and is inside the critical section. Hence, A is looping outside the critical section and keep trying to get the lock and waisting the CPU."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1877", "answer_text": "multi process and threads 同時要共享資源，導致其他process進不來，需要在外面等待"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1701", "answer_text": "busy waiting is the situation that the process is looping, continuous checking the condition exist that allow the process continue."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1951", "answer_text": "A process or a thread is looping in software to check whether the condition exists now is over. It often occurs when a thread is waiting to get into a critical section. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "1945", "answer_text": "當thread或process在looping時，會check是否能繼續執行後續工作，當有其他thread或process正在占用CPU執行critical section時，將無法繼續執行後續工作，會持續詢問是否可以執行工作，也就造成busy waiting。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2026", "answer_text": "A process is looping, continuously checking a condition exists that will allow it to continue."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1899", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is when a thread repeatedly checks a condition in a loop without sleeping."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5336", "answer_text": "spinlock is basically when the the processes are in queue and they are arranged according to their priority but the higher priority always gets to run even when it was the last to come in so the processes that have lower priority does not have the chance to execute at all"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2030", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is when the process is looping for a required statement happed. E.g. when a process is trying to acquire a lock to enter critical section, it while keep looking for whether the lock is released."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2659", "answer_text": "If a process need some resource but the resource was used, it will use a while loop to request until the resource release."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1981", "answer_text": "busy waiting(spinlock)是指cpu不斷地在迴圈裡等待，常出現在使用共享資源時，只有一個或少數thread能夠進入，而其他進不去的thread只能在原地空轉等待。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1786", "answer_text": "A process enters a loop waiting for resources(a lock or key), and will leave the loop after getting the resource."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2802", "answer_text": "process  keep in the loop (keep use CPU) for getting access to critical section"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1905", "answer_text": "A process keeps waiting for some condition and occupies the CPU resource. For example, a process keep requesting for a lock which is used by other process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1932", "answer_text": "用無限迴圈等待 critical section 的 key。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1826", "answer_text": "有兩個threadA, threadB，且threadA的優先度較高，threadB的優先度較低。當threadB在CS中，但沒有權限，threadA有權限卻無法進入，只能在外持續等待。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1835", "answer_text": "thread或process進入等待迴圈，用於在鎖釋放時取得鎖"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2001", "answer_text": "process/thread要存取某個共享資源或lock時，不block/不sleep，在CPU上loop continuous checking直到達成某些條件才繼續執行。例:process要求能否進入critical section或polling i/o device是否ready。"}]}

result: {"count": 20, "total_matched": 63, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "2029", "answer_text": "一個low priority的process A已經拿到lock, 同時一個high priority的process B想使用A正在使用的資源, 但因為B的priority比較高, 讓A沒辦法釋放lock, B只能一直等待, 無法使用資源"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2434", "answer_text": "Busy waiting means that a thread is looping since it needs to repeatedly check if the resource (such as a lock that is holding by another thread) is released."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2056", "answer_text": "Busy waiting is a situation when a thread is looping, continuously checking whether a condition exists that it to continue."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1671", "answer_text": "busy waiting常見於當一個process需要等待某個資源，像是lock或semaphore等，thread會一直發出詢問直到資源釋放，可能會導致CPU 使用率下降"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1963", "answer_text": "high priority的process 陷入spinlock loop,進入不到critical section執行不了,導致priority inversion"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1910", "answer_text": "一個process一直在不斷的進行迴圈，一直不斷的檢查是否能進入critical section。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2402", "answer_text": "busy waiting 是指當threads or process在執行的過程一直跑空迴圈,去等待資源(例如:I/O 的請求或C.S.的進入)"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2124", "answer_text": "Busy waiting or spinlock is the situation where a process is continuously checking a condition in a loop, instead of executing. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "2705", "answer_text": "Busy waiting entails a phenomenon where a process keeps on checking for a chance to enter the critical section, but fails because there is a longer process still executing, so the process keeps on knocking without success."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1914", "answer_text": "A task is waiting to get a shared resource and keep running on CPU to check whether the resource is available."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1985", "answer_text": "The technique that let process(or thread) keep looping, checking for conditions that the process(or thread) can continue to execute or not. {"count": 20, "total_matched": 23, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "1948", "answer_text": "A spinlock is a phenomenon where a thread holds a lock but one or many threads are kept occupying the resources and cannot exit its critical section. So the threads are starving."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2208", "answer_text": "當一個高優先權的thread或process需要一個資源才能執行，但此資源卻在另一個低優先權的thread或process上，以至於高優先權的thread在cpu上持續迴圈等待資源，造成cpu持續被占用。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2533", "answer_text": "所謂忙碌等待：高優先權等待低優先權解鎖，此時不會睡眠或阻塞，而是進入迴圏等待滿足條作，此時會造成CPU浪費。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1976", "answer_text": "當thread在等待CS內的resource，thread不會休眠而會一直在CS外執行loop檢查是否有lock可以拿"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2220", "answer_text": "a thread is keep waiting and checking some condition that allow it to continue"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2060", "answer_text": "thread循環進行，持續查看是否有允許可進入執行，透過poll查看內容。
low-priority進入lock，但因執行順序取決於優先權高低，所以應由high-priority先執行，導致low-priority佔用lock並在裡面出不來，而high-priority卻無法進入lock。高優先權者實際上要先執行，卻被卡住而無法執行就稱為busy waitiong"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1828", "answer_text": "a process is looping, continugous checking whether condition exist to allow it to continue
常被用於等待進入critical section和poll device等等"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1885", "answer_text": "when a process A with lower priority have the lock, and a process B with higher priority but not have a lock, process A will always waiting B to be executed because it has higher priority, but the process B can not execute because it does not have the lock, and A have not chance to execute to release the lock. The solution is priority inheritance, give the process that held lock the highest priority and set the priority back after that process have executed."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1799", "answer_text": "一個process 一直在looping 等待某些條件被滿足（有可能是等待lock），這就是busy waiting"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1806", "answer_text": "One process is keep checking the shared resource or entering critical section is available or not, while the resource is occupied by other process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1923", "answer_text": "Assume they are two process, A and B.
A is in Critical Section now, and B is waiting for the permission and check by a loop.
The condition B meet is busy waiting."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1845", "answer_text": "一個process在某個迴圈中不斷檢查是否滿足某些條件，直到可以繼續執行，常用於檢查是否可以執行crital section"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1848", "answer_text": "busy waiting就是一個程式遇到一個loop，CPU要一直確定那個loop的condition 是否達成，無法往下執行，CPU就會無法執行其他程式，他會在那邊一直等到condition達成"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4944", "answer_text": "The threads is looping , continuously checking the exist state,  check whether it can run.
And this may consume CPU resources, waste the resources. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "2032", "answer_text": "busy waiting (spinlock) is the situation that the thread is looping, continuously checking whether the condition exists that allow it to continue."}, {"exam_answer_id": "1906", "answer_text": "在loop裡面，CPU要一直check process的狀態，導致CPU被process占用很多時間但一直在空轉"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2382", "answer_text": "當有兩個processes要進入critical section，但critical section只允許一個process進入，而另一個process等待的狀態即為busy waiting(spinlock)"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2036", "answer_text": "就是有thread在critical section 時外面的人進不去只能等裡面的人釋放鎖才能進去，在這段時間就會一直呼叫while去看裡面的人好了沒，只能在外面空等"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1846", "answer_text": "Busy waiting, or call as spinlock, always loop to check a condition in a process, "}, {"exam_answer_id": "2050", "answer_text": "優先權較高的行程會一直執行迴圈來輪詢cpu是否空閒"}]}
